## Verification

<!-- Which gates did you run? Paste the relevant tails. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass for every package touched (`backend` / `web` / `mcp`)
- [ ] Typecheck + lint pass for every package touched
- [ ] Bug fixes include a regression test
- [ ] User-visible flows verified (matching `verify:*` smoke or manual steps described below)
